overall.description: Gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 depicting a rainy night in the Old West town of Rhodes. The camera begins at ground level in muddy wagon ruts, rises to reveal wooden storefronts with glowing windows, passes a cowboy standing on a porch, and continues down the main street toward a drug store with a parked wagon.

scene_state.functional_zone: muddy street with deep wagon ruts

events.description: camera rises from ground level and tilts upward to reveal the building porch
warm artificial light from building windows becomes visible against the dark night

agents.ego_description: rising from ground level while observing the muddy wagon tracks in the rain

entered.detail: wet mud with deep wagon wheel ruts and rain puddles reflecting light
parallel grooves carved into the muddy road surface
weathered wooden stairs leading up to the building entrance
two-story wooden building with glowing yellow windows

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with an extreme low-angle view of a muddy, rain-soaked street with prominent wagon tracks. The camera slowly rises and tilts upward, revealing the wooden facade of a building with warm light emanating from its windows, transitioning from ground level to a standing perspective.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered wooden porch of the Rhodes Hotel

events.description: encountering an NPC standing on the porch wearing a cowboy hat
passing the stationary character and continuing along the porch railing

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden porch past a stationary cowboy NPC

notable_agents.action: standing on the porch wearing a cowboy hat, facing toward the street

entered.detail: white painted wooden railing with decorative vertical posts
wall-mounted oil lamp casting warm orange light
sign reading RHODES on the upper facade of the building

segments.scene_description: Moving along the covered wooden porch of the Rhodes Hotel, the camera passes a stationary cowboy NPC standing near the railing. The warm glow of porch lanterns illuminates the scene as rain continues to fall, and the building's signage becomes visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: main street of western town with wooden sidewalks

events.description: exiting the covered porch into the open muddy street
passing under street lamps casting pools of light on the wet ground

agents.ego_description: walking down the muddy main street between rows of wooden buildings

entered.detail: raised wooden plank walkway running alongside the street
wooden telegraph pole with crossbars and wires
tall wooden pole with a glowing gas lamp

segments.scene_description: Leaving the porch behind, the camera moves into the open muddy street lined with wooden sidewalks and telegraph poles. Street lamps cast warm pools of light on the wet ground as the camera continues down the main thoroughfare of the town.

scene_state.functional_zone: town intersection with parked wagon and drug store

events.description: approaching a large wooden wagon parked in the street
camera slows and stops near the wagon, focusing on the drug store facade

agents.ego_description: slowing to a stop near the parked wagon while observing the drug store building

entered.detail: old west freight wagon with large wooden wheels parked on the muddy street
two-story wooden building with DRUGS painted in large letters on the upper facade
warm lights glowing from buildings further down the street

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a wooden freight wagon parked in the street and slows to a stop. The two-story drug store building dominates the right side of the frame with its painted signage, while street lamps and distant saloon lights illuminate the rainy night scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that rises from the muddy ground of a rain-soaked street to reveal the illuminated storefronts of a frontier town at night. It begins with an extreme low-angle view of deep wagon ruts in the mud, slowly tilting upward to transition from ground level to a standing perspective before a wooden building facade. As the camera glides along the covered porch of the Rhodes Hotel, it passes a stationary cowboy under the warm glow of lanterns and overhead signage. The scene then opens into the main thoroughfare, moving past telegraph poles and street lamps that cast golden pools of light across the wet pavement. Finally, the camera approaches a parked freight wagon and slows to a stop, framing a two-story drug store against the backdrop of distant saloon lights and falling rain.
